subject: Cannot login to VPN
description: I'm unable to connect to the corporate VPN since this morning. Getting an authentication error every time. I have a client call in an hour and need access to internal tools.
reasoning: The ticket describes a VPN authentication failure that is blocking access to internal tools ahead of a time-sensitive client call.
